caption: Attack approach around the hill: the cavalry spawns directly in the hill's lane, so its charge must detour -- it steers by the corridor's long-run direction (with a formation-width berth around the routed footprint) and pivots onto it in good order, holding rank-and-file all the way to contact. The same approach used to snap its slot grid to each coarse per-cell path bearing (any jump under the 75-degree fold threshold rotated the grid in one tick) and smear into a blob -- the pre-contact blobbing of the showcase's rightmost unit.
